notes: This dataset is intentionally compact. It stores source-referenced rules and calculation methods, while exact table-derived design rows can be added as screenshots/tables are verified.
Table-derived values should be checked by the designer against the adopted NFPA 13 edition and AHJ requirements before use.

methods.label: CMDA density/area
methods.description: Sprinkler demand equals design density multiplied by design area. For storage over 12 ft, the 2019 indexed rule requires at least 0.15 gpm/ft2 and at least 2000 ft2 for wet systems or 2600 ft2 for dry/preaction systems.

methods.label: ESFR k-factor/pressure
methods.description: Sprinkler demand equals the discharge from the selected ESFR sprinkler at the required pressure multiplied by the number of operating sprinklers. NFPA 13 2019 indexes the standard ESFR design area as 12 sprinklers unless a storage section requires another number.

methods.label: CMSA k-factor/pressure
methods.description: Sprinkler demand equals the discharge from the selected CMSA sprinkler at the required pressure multiplied by the table-required number of operating sprinklers. The design area shape follows the CMSA method.

methods.label: In-rack additive demand
methods.description: In-rack demand is added to the ceiling demand and balanced to the higher pressure. Use table-required operating in-rack sprinklers and minimum flow or pressure from the adopted edition.
